level_signals: Expected to own full roadmap for sensitive deployment Integrity controls
Must turn ambiguous policy/threat-model questions into product requirements
High-consequence, cross-functional scope across Policy, Legal, Privacy, Safety Systems, Government

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have shipped complex product systems in AI, integrity, trust and safety, security, privacy, risk, government, regulated enterprise, or AI safety.
Can turn ambiguous policy and threat-model questions into product requirements, metrics, operational workflows, and tradeoff frameworks.
Are energized by agentic AI products and want to build the platform layer that makes them safer to deploy.
Care about security, privacy, and responsible deployment, while still wanting to build concrete product systems.
Own the roadmap for sensitive deployment Integrity controls and readiness criteria.
Define how we measure residual risk, decision quality, review quality, and mitigation effectiveness.
Build agentic investigation and context-assembly workflows for complex, multi-step misuse patterns.
Partner with Policy, Legal, Privacy, Safety Systems, User Ops, Government, and product teams to build shared capabilities.
Create launch and deployment playbooks for sensitive customer, capability, and product contexts.

scope.surface: Integrity controls for sensitive deployments: government, high-trust enterprise, privacy-constrained environments, agentic workflows

green_flags: Clear product ownership area with high-consequence, high-visibility scope
Broad cross-functional exposure across Policy, Legal, Privacy, Safety Systems, Government, Research

Onsite in San Francisco only — no remote option mentioned, eliminates non-SF candidates
Highly niche domain intersection (government + agentic AI + integrity) significantly narrows qualified candidate pool
